target.title: [codex] Simplify proof nudge schedule
target.body:
## Summary

Simplifies the proof-nudge scheduled workflow to one daily UTC cron and removes the Central-time guard entirely.

## Root cause

The workflow previously had two cron triggers because GitHub Actions schedules are UTC-only: `0 10 * * *` maps to 5 AM Central during CDT, while `0 11 * * *` maps to 5 AM Central during CST. PR #254 restored a strict `local_hour == 05` guard so the wrong seasonal cron would skip. On June 5, 2026, GitHub delivered the CDT cron late at `2026-06-05 06:04:27 CDT`, so that correct seasonal run skipped before checkout. The CST cron then fired at `2026-06-05 07:01:51 CDT` and skipped too. Both runs were green and short because they only executed the guard and artifact upload; neither reached checkout, setup, token creation, or `pnpm run proof-nudges`.

Since we do not need strict 5 AM Central behavior, the root-cause-style fix is to stop emulating local time in workflow logic. This keeps one real scheduled run per day and accepts the simple UTC schedule: 5 AM Central in summer, 4 AM Central in winter, plus any GitHub delivery delay.

## Changes

- Keep only `0 10 * * *`.
- Remove the `Check scheduled Central time` step.
- Remove all `steps.central-time.outputs.should_run == 'true'` guards from checkout/setup/run steps.
- Update docs and workflow assertions for the single-cron contract.

## Validation

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check .github/workflows/proof-nudges.yml docs/proof-nudges.md test/clawsweeper.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm run build && node --test test/clawsweeper.test.ts --test-name-pattern "proof nudge workflow is manual-first"` (Node ran the full file; 359 tests passed)


## Maintainer cadence decision

Per maintainer direction in the Codex thread, we explicitly accept one daily `0 10 * * *` UTC run instead of strict 5:00 AM America/Chicago behavior. That means the scheduled proof-nudge lane is 5:00 AM Central during daylight saving time and 4:00 AM Central during standard time, plus any normal GitHub Actions schedule delivery delay.

## After-fix workflow proof

Manual dry-run proof on the PR head: https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/actions/runs/27024830642

This run used `workflow_dispatch` on `codex/simplify-proof-nudge-cron` with `execute=false` and `limit=0`, so it exercised checkout, target token creation, state token creation, state hydration, pnpm setup, `pnpm run proof-nudges`, and artifact upload without posting comments.

Key redacted log lines:

```text
✓ Proof nudges in 5m32s
✓ Run actions/checkout@v6
✓ Resolve target repository
✓ Create target proof-nudge token
✓ Create state token
✓ Run ./.github/actions/setup-state
✓ Run ./.github/actions/setup-pnpm
✓ Run proof nudges
✓ Run actions/upload-artifact@v7

PROOF_NUDGES_EXECUTE: false
PROOF_NUDGES_LIMIT: 0
> node dist/clawsweeper.js proof-nudges -- --target-repo openclaw/openclaw --limit 0 --min-age-days 5 --cooldown-days 7 --report-path proof-nudge-report.json
[proof-nudges] 2026-06-05T15:51:08.031Z starting proof nudges: candidates=3393 min_age_days=5 cooldown_days=7 item_numbers=all nudges=0/0 processed=0/50 dry_run=true counts={}
[proof-nudges] 2026-06-05T15:51:08.033Z finished proof nudges nudges=0/0 processed=0/50 dry_run=true counts={}
Artifact proof-nudge-report has been successfully uploaded! Final size is 164 bytes. Artifact ID is 7440838743
```
target.author: takhoffman
